mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fee_type IS NULL OR fee_type != 'deposit_refund') AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline <= CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dueReceivableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 'deposit_refund' AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline <= CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS duePayableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fee_type IS NULL OR fee_type != 'deposit_refund') AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline > CURDATE() AND pay_deadline <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS next30ReceivableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 'deposit_refund' AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline > CURDATE() AND pay_deadline <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS next30PayableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fee_type IS NULL OR fee_type != 'deposit_refund') AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueTenantDebtAmount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (fee_type IS NULL OR fee_type != 'deposit_refund') AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline <= CURDATE() THEN customer_name ELSE NULL END), 0) AS dueTenantCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fee_type IS NULL OR fee_type != 'deposit_refund') AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline = CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayOtherReceivableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 'deposit_refund' AND COALESCE(pay_status, '0') != '1' AND pay_deadline = CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayOtherPayableAmount FROM biz_contract_payment WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status IN ('1', '5', '6', '7', '8') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS terminatedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status = '2' OR end_date < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expiredCount FROM biz_contract WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS vacantRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rentedRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS lockedRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expiredRooms, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN rent_price IS NOT NULL AND rent_price > 0 THEN rent_price END), 0) AS averageRent, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN area ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rentedArea, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)), 0) AS totalArea, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN area ELSE 0 END), 0) AS vacantArea, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('1', '2') THEN area ELSE 0 END), 0) AS billableArea FROM ics_room WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT opportunity_id AS id, COALESCE(enterprise_name, opportunity_no) AS name, COALESCE(follow_user, create_by, '-') AS followUser, COALESCE(next_follow_time, update_time, create_time) AS remindTime, opportunity_status AS status FROM biz_business_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND opportunity_status != 'DEAL'
ORDER BY COALESCE(next_follow_time, update_time, create_time) ASC, opportunity_id DESC LIMIT 8
